data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: End-to-end encryption ensures that only you and the person you're communicating with can read what is sent.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Signal Protocol for message encryption.

data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: Additional layer of security to protect user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Requires a six-digit passcode for verification.

data.title: Fraud Detection Systems
data.description: Automated systems to detect and prevent spam and fraudulent activities.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms monitor message patterns to identify malicious activities.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Security teams conduct regular audits and vulnerability assessments.
data.technical_spec: Follows OWASP guidelines and uses penetration testing for validation.

data.title: Server-Side Security
data.description: Multiple layers of security on the server side.
data.technical_spec: Firewalls, intrusion detection systems, and regular patch management.
